notes: Orthogonal to admin-ui-revamp — addresses visual primitives, not architecture.
Same branch (feature/admin-ui-revamp). No contract or indexer changes.
Steps 1-3 are foundational (tokens + components). Steps 4-9 are migration. Steps 10-12 are polish.
13 modal files migrate to ModalDialog. CardBase/SurfaceCard preserved as re-exports.

history.details: Deep audit identified 7 systemic UI issues: surface monotony, z-index chaos, missing glass language, modal duplication, garden tablet layout, typography debt, spacing inconsistency. 12-step plan created. 7 decisions logged.
